title: AI-Driven Resilience for O-RAN and NextG Networks
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning and agentic AI for joint slice admission, PRB allocation, and resource orchestration, with resilience to jamming and disruptive users.

title: Zero Trust Security Intelligence for 5G Networks
summary: A holistic zero trust approach for trusted communications over untrusted 5G infrastructure, with continuous trust monitoring and adaptive access control.

title: Cyber Supply Chain Risk Analysis and Mitigation
summary: Modeling, computation, and software tools for risk analysis across IT, OT, and IoT supply chains for critical and automotive infrastructure.

title: Resilient Connectivity for IoT in Adversarial Environments
summary: Secure, reconfigurable multi-layer network design and feedback-based UAV connectivity for remotely deployed mobile IoT.
